title: Classifying Customer Reviews as Positive or Negative
scenario: Write a prompt that will classify a customer review as positive or negative using a pre-trained model. The input will be the review content. The output should include the classification result and a confidence score. The prompt must use the classification model's API and be under 50 words. The classification model should have a high accuracy rate for detecting sarcastic reviews.
constraints: Must use pre-trained model for text classification

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Is the classification model used accurate for detecting sarcastic reviews?
Is the output in markdown format and within the 50-character limit for the species name?
Can the bot understand and execute the prompt without further explanation?
